text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
The "Umanail ☆ Channel" live stream<n>was fire! All
the techniques they<n>dropped left me gagged. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But the one about how to do gradation<n>got me
lowkey kinda sad. Their<n>technique with the polish
was just way<n>too high-level.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
...But what's the use in getting down?<n>I've just
gotta steal their goated<n>techniques! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
And I'll start by going to a goated nail<n>salon!
... As soon as I actually find one.
